title: erythroxylum coca var. coca
intro: Erythroxylum coca var. coca, also known as the coca plant, is a native South American shrub with medicinal properties. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine and as a stimulant, containing alkaloids such as cocaine and ecgonine. The plant's medicinal properties include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and adaptogenic effects, which can provide health benefits such as pain relief, improved cognitive function, and enhanced mood. Erythroxylum coca var. coca can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine and as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
